title: host-meta: XML endpoint for WebFinger discovery
description:
Implement /.well-known/host-meta returning XML with a Link element whose template points to the WebFinger URL. Some servers check this before attempting WebFinger.

Test discipline:
- Parse the response XML and verify the Link/@template attribute points to the correct WebFinger URL
- Test Content-Type is application/xrd+xml

Defensive programming:
- Do not use a templating library for 10 lines of XML — just format! a string to avoid introducing an XML dep
acceptance_criteria: Valid XML with correct WebFinger template; Content-Type application/xrd+xml; domain is correctly interpolated
